name: construction project managers using Google Workspace tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 equipment logs/month, inefficient tracking causes missed maintenance schedules. We automate the preparation of usage logs instead of manual logging and spreadsheet tracking.
target_audience: construction project managers using Google Workspace
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of equipment usage and maintenance summaries.
